spoken_transcript: 嗯，每天早上我都會去菜市場買菜。 今天好像忘記帶錢包了，欸，應該有放在桌上才對。 後來阿母幫我拿出來，我才記得要去診所拿藥。囝仔也在那邊等我，我們一起回家吃早餐。

generation_notes: CDR 1 mild: Shows word-finding difficulty (forgetting wallet), mild repetition of checking memory, and one orientation error regarding location. Speech remains coherent with natural pauses.
